name: Guard0 Security Plugin
description: In-process security monitoring for OpenClaw — injection detection, PII scanning, tool blocking, event streaming to g0 daemon

authToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating webhook requests to g0 daemon

logToolCalls.description: Log all tool executions to webhook

detectInjection.description: Scan messages and tool arguments for injection patterns

scanPii.description: Scan tool output for PII and redact before persistence

blockedTools.description: Tool names to block at the gateway level (execution denied)

highRiskTools.description: Tool names that trigger detailed logging (arguments captured)

maxArgSize.description: Max bytes to log per tool argument before truncation

quietWebhook.description: Suppress webhook connection errors in logs

injectPolicy.description: Inject Guard0 security policy into agent context on start

registerGateTool.description: Register the g0_security_check tool for command/file-path gating
